notableEvents.label: Will Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Will Smith grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Freddie Freeman out at 2nd. Will Smith out at 1st.
